snippet.title: Teri Aadat | Siddharth Nigam | Anushka Sen | Abhi Dutt | New Hindi Song| Official Video| BLive Music
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents new official video song Teri Aadat soulful vocal by ABHI DUTT featuring Siddharth Nigam and Anushka Sen. The lyrics are penned by Ishaan Khan and the music directed by Aishwarya Tripathi. Nitin Fcp & Nadeem Akhtar have directed the video. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja.

#TeriAadat  #AbhiDutt  #LatestSongs2021 #SiddharthNigam #AnushkaSen #BLiveMusic

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Master Ji Ka Bhoot - Amit Bhadana
snippet.description:
Do badmash students ne kar rakha hai apne master ji ki naak mein dum aur is duniya mein nahi hai unka koi bhi ilaaj. Par kya karenge vo dono jab master ji dosari duniya se mangne ayenge jawaab? Is kahani mein hum aapko parlok ki sair karayenge, thoda sa darr lagega par bahut sara hansayenge. Masterji ki class mein attendance lagao aur bakiyon ko bhi le kar aao.

Follow Me On Instagram & Twitter ⬇️

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/theamitbhadana

Twitter: https://twitter.com/iAmitBhadana 

🎬 Video Team 

Directed By : Amit Bhadana, Swapnil Narendra 
Written & Created By : Amit Bhadana
D.O.P : Manish Pandit
Edited By : Amit Bhadana
Assistant Director : Rahul Bhati, Apurva Chaudhary
Color Grading : Sarfaraz Zuber
VFX : Vishesh 
Background Music : Riyaz Qadir & PC Arun 
Thumbnail : Muzammil Hayaat

Makeup : Govind & Mac Pal 
Hair : Rohit Diwakar
Prosthetic Makeup : Sunny

snippet.title: Dice Media | Operation MBBS | Season 2 | Web Series | Episode 1 - Honeymoon Period
snippet.description:
The second year of MBBS is known to medical students as the honeymoon period before things begin to get really tough 📚
But as our trio settle into this new phase, they realise they’ll have to dig deeper than they expected, especially with one particular case of coronavirus taking a personal toll on all their lives later on! 🦠

Unacademy presents Operation MBBS 2.
#DiceOperationMBBS2 #AyushMehra #AnshulChauhan #SarahHashmi

With Unacademy, you too can get guidance from India’s Top Educators, build a strong foundation and crack NEET-UG with ease. 
Download the Unacademy Learning App here: https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/67950194

hi.title: Dice Media | Operation MBBS | Season 2 | Web Series | Episode 1 - Honeymoon Period
hi.description:
The second year of MBBS is known to medical students as the honeymoon period before things begin to get really tough 📚
But as our trio settle into this new phase, they realise they’ll have to dig deeper than they expected, especially with one particular case of coronavirus taking a personal toll on all their lives later on! 🦠

Unacademy presents Operation MBBS 2.
#DiceOperationMBBS2 #AyushMehra #AnshulChauhan #SarahHashmi

With Unacademy, you too can get guidance from India’s Top Educators, build a strong foundation and crack NEET-UG with ease. 
Download the Unacademy Learning App here: https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/67950194

snippet.title: Babuni Tere Rang Mein | Pawan Singh, Tridha, Sharvi | Dr Sagar | Salim Sulaiman | Merchant Records
snippet.description:
Tayyar ho jaiye iss Holi ka jashn manane ke liye, aapke apne #PawanSingh ke sath! We had so much fun making this video with Pawan Singh and Tridha Chaudhury with beautiful vocals by Pawan Singh and Sharvi Yadav! 

Apna pyaar dijiye and let's celebrate #Holi2021 in the power-star-Pawan style! ✨ Subscribe now for more music every week!

🎧 Listen to & download 'Babuni Tere Rang Mein' on:

Wynk: https://wynk.in/music/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein/or_196006272005_ING642100271

JioSaavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein/Rx8cfExHY34

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/2sPqQdQ2rJZtTdhcymBZSD?si=vWcI_Uj6RdK9nH_TKX_c_A

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein

Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJN3Jk64/

Hungama: https://www.hungama.com/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein/63302712/

Amazon Prime Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08YDCVW7H?trackAsin=B08YDDZ4P7&ref=dm_sh_IQcfo2LLvB4GEnQac1ImmRrLZ

To Set "Babuni Tere Rang Mein" Your Caller Tune: 
Vodafone Customers Dial 53712379375
Idea Customers Dial 53712379375
BSNL Customers Dial 5678912379375

Audio Credits -

Music Composed & Produced by : Salim - Sulaiman
Lyrics : Dr. Sagar
Singers : Pawan Singh, Sharvi Yadav
Additional Music Production : Raj Pandit
Tabla : Navin Sharma
Dholak : Aslam Dafrani, Navin Sharma
Bulbul Tarang & Harmonium : Pradeep Pandit
Recorded by : Aftab Khan & Raj Pandit at Blue Productions 
Mixed & Mastered by : Aftab Khan at Headroom Studio
Distributed by Global Music Junction 

Video Credits - 

Starring : Pawan Singh, Tridha Chaudhury
Choreographer & Director : Caesar Gonsalves

Associate Producer : Rajveer Ahuja 
Executive Producer : Rajesh Chakre 
Production Head : Tanka 
Production Assistant : Suraj Jana
DOP : Chandan Kowli
Post Supervisor & Editor : Abhishek Wahee
Colorist : Dilshad Nanji
DI Studio : Coolabmedia
Production Designer : Uday Prakash Singh 
Art Assistant Director : Vaibhav 
Art Assistant Director : Vivek
Stylist : Divya and Prameet
Location : Sania resort 

Pawan Singh's Management & Social Media Promotions : Amit Singh
Managed by : Nirav Thakar, Radhika Mistry
Digital Strategy : Shivansh Jindal
Album Creatives : Dishant Mistry
PR : Lily Ahluwalia

Lyrics -

Rango ki katori hun
Tang se chatori hun
Chahun mai colorful piya

Chahat ki tarango mein
Doobi hun mai rango mein
Pink pink mora jiya

Geeli geeli si
Geeli geeli meri dhaar
Aaja dekh le fuhaar
Pichkaari nahi ye
Tere love ka shikaar

Babuni tere rang mein
Babuni tere rang mein
Mai aur thoda young ho gyaa
Mai bhola bhaala lalla
Chappan inch dabangg ho gaya
Babuni tere rang me
Mai aur thoda young ho gaya

Antra

Kulhad mein whisky
Toh saiyaan ji hai risky
Kulhad mein whisky
Toh saiyaan ji hai risky
Maare ignore
Mai deewani hui jiski

Peeli peeli hai.. Haaye
Peeli peeli maine chaar
Ki hairaan thekedaar
Mujhko majnu banaake
De de laila waala pyaar

Babuni tere rang me
Mai aur thoda young ho gaya
Kheenchein jaise chumbak emotion tera
Babuni tere rang me
Chappan inch dabangg ho gaya
Naam saare jille me roshan tera

Babuni tere rang mein,
Mai aur thoda.. ho gaya!

snippet.title: Types Of Unboxers | Jordindian
snippet.description:
“WHAT’S IN THE BOX??”, shouted Brad Pitt. Little did we know that we would feel the same way while watching, what is known very famously today as, ‘Unboxing Videos’. Some might even call it therapeutic. But that’s far from what you’re going to see in this video. Watch as we put a Jordindian twist on the different types of unboxing experiences.

Lyrics -
Jab dekhya pehli baar tere te pyar tere te ho gaya re,
Yo toot na jave sapna sa yo soch ferrer te te so gaya re,
Main khud sapne mein kho gaya re mane bera na ke ho gaya re,
Location teri bhardi oye aur tere pyar ka root liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

O kit re tu aayi hai aur kit si tane jaana se,
Debate chalegi tere pe ib shuru kiya se gaana se,
Abhiyaan search tera jaari hai tane galti kardi bhaari se,
Ib chaapa padna tere pe kara Janhit bheta jari se,
Oye haani karak zehar tera aur galti te maine ghoot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

Tu paue jitni dikikhan mein or bottle barga asar tera,
Re samajh kise ke aaya na isa kar diya se yo hashar mera,
Nu aage pache bohot ghani par dil tere pe aaya se,
Akhand taareef ki patar tu jab geet tere pe gaya hai,
Baaki to sab moh-maya se aur sabka bhanda foot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya, 

Oye yaar tera full paapi hai na duji koi copy se,
Mai ek ekla antique su ya news aa ne bhi chaapi hai,
Re Dil te Dhanyawad karu meri zindagi mein jo aayi tu,
Ya saare raaji ho jange banja inki bharjayi tu,
Chal chhod jeans or top tera ja Mere naam ka suit liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya.

snippet.title: Major Glimpse | Major Teaser on 28th March | Adivi Sesh | Sobhita | Saiee Manjrekar | Mahesh Babu
snippet.description:
Major Glimpse: On Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan's Birth Anniversary, we remember.

‘The film speaks about the way he lived, not about the way he lost his life.’ Today, March 15th, Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan's birth anniversary, is not just a day to remember him but also a day to celebrate his glorious life.

#MajorTheFilm #MajorGlimpse #AdiviSesh #MaheshBabu

Based on the life of real-life Hero Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, Major, the film, aims to show how this valiant soldier saved the lives of numerous hostages before being martyred by the terrorists who wreaked havoc in the Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai, India on the 26th of November, 2008.

Major, a bilingual Hindi and Telugu film has been produced by Sony Pictures Films India in association with Mahesh Babu's GMB Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. and A+S Movies. It is directed by acclaimed Telugu director Sashi Kiran Tikka and features Adivi Sesh, Sobhita Dhulipala and Saiee Manjrekar. 


Starring Adivi Sesh, Saiee Manjrekar, Sobhita Dhulipala, Prakash Raj, Revathi, Murali Sharma 
Produced by: Sony Pictures, GMB Entertainment, and A+S Movies
Directed by: Sashi Kiran Tikka
Story and Screenplay: Adivi Sesh 
Script Guidance and Telugu Dialogue: Abburi Ravi 
Cinematography: Vamsi Patchipulusu
Music : Sri Charan Pakala
Lyrics: Ramajogayya Sastry (Telugu)
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Editor: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi &  Kodati Pavan Kalyan
Action Choreography: Sunil Rodrigues 
Executive Producer: Rajiv Bharadwaj
Hindi Dialogues: Akshat Ajay Sharma
Costume Designer : Rekha Boggarapu
VFX Supervisor: CV Rao
Post Production: Annapurna Studios 
Publicity Designs : Anil-Bhanu

snippet.title: MUTTON BONE MARROW | Chettinad Mutton Bone Marrow Cooking and Eating in Village | Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
Today in our village, we cook 100+ mutton bone marrow with the traditional Chettinad method. Mutton bone marrow is one of the tastiest piece in the mutton recipe. 

We collect a huge amount of bone marrow to make this mutton recipe.

We enjoy this traditionally cooked mutton bone recipe with our mutton gravy.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder’s Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:

localized.title: Zack Snyder’s Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
localized.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-​​...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram​​
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook​​
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

Hook

Jithhe khada yaar tera ohthe vajde saloot
Main chak ke qalam saare beri karaan shoot
Shareef hunda si jamana karda si use
Hun beriyaan di jaan sukhaade Raja!

Verse 1


Main karna rap,
Beriyaan nu mere aana aj hosh kive?
Main bharda bag,
Nottan to vadd hona dasso josh kive?
They callin’ me GOAT,
Har baar maru naya sa flow.
Har baar maru naya main hit.
Enhadi Industry dena main kho.
kho hoe!

1 saal vich tripple price baby,

Kala mein rang ni beta muh band hi rakho!
Jo mujhe rokna chaho rok na pao
to beta muh band hi rakho!
Main bana dekhte dekhte kal ki awaaz
tum beta muh band hi rakho!

tum beta bas duro takhhon!

Duniya kehti ye alag likta hai,

Jadd bannde star ta pher change honde view,

snippet.description:

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3122: Jethala Shows The Proof
---------------------------------------------------------
While Gokuldham members enter the society gate dancing, Chalu Pandey sees them and makes them stop because Bhogilal had called him and filed a false complaint against Jethalal. Chalu Pandey questions Jethalal and others and takes Bhogilal's side. Jetha explains to him the entire scenario and shows the proven video to Pandey Ji. what will happen next? watch the full episode now.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Zaiba's Birthday-ക്ക് ജനങ്ങൾ കൊടുത്ത SURPRISE 😱🤩
snippet.description:
We are sooo happy, especially our zaiba mol. Yesterday she was so thrilled to receive her surprise birthday party, which was organised by family wedding center. We were super happy to share our happiness with super cool people like kallu and mathuu(Rajkalesh & mathukutty).No words to explain the love that we received yesterday. We thank each and everyone who gathered there yesterday for making our little girl's bday an unforgettable one.



Checkout our Blog :- https://roshensblog.com/

localized.title: Zaiba's Birthday-ക്ക് ജനങ്ങൾ കൊടുത്ത SURPRISE 😱🤩
localized.description:
We are sooo happy, especially our zaiba mol. Yesterday she was so thrilled to receive her surprise birthday party, which was organised by family wedding center. We were super happy to share our happiness with super cool people like kallu and mathuu(Rajkalesh & mathukutty).No words to explain the love that we received yesterday. We thank each and everyone who gathered there yesterday for making our little girl's bday an unforgettable one.

snippet.title: ആരും കണ്ട് മയങ്ങണ് Classmates | Thanseer koothuparamba Azi mol ansar ansu Munaz Haneefa nizar shriya
snippet.description:
➤ Album : Classmates 
➤ Song Name: Azhakilai 
➤ Singer : Thanseer koothuparamba
➤ Music  : Haneefa Ksd
➤ Lyrics : Haneefa Ksd
➤ Orchestraion : Sai Balan
➤ Camera :  Nizar shriya
➤ Editting : Nizar shriya
➤ Marketting : Taalboys vision
➤ Cast : Thanseer koothuparamba Azi mol
➤ cast : Mehnaz mehnu & Crew
➤ Story : Ansar Ansu & Munaz Munnu
➤ Feedback : 9745268950 [ Whatsapp ]
➤ Diriction  : Ansar Ansu & Munaz Munnu
➤ Produced : Rinjas Rinju & Yasar Kallai
...................................................................................................
Classmates | Azhakilai | Thanseer koothuparamba | Azi mol ansar ansu Munaz Haneefa Ksd nizar shriya

...................................................................................................

➤ Lyrics 
Azhakilaay viriyumaa niranilavin punjiri
Surumayaal varanoraa mizhikalil minnum muhabath.. 
Aarum kand mayangan.. 
Oolen qalb kavaranu.. 
Enthoo ullam pidayan.. 
Ishkaal enne nokan.. 
Manamil nirayum manas thirayum madhuramam chiri vidharumivalinn (2)

     ( Azhakilay viruyuma..)

Ishal vaniyilu.. 
ithal viriyan.. 
Ival chelotha kaarmugiloo... 
Vaathilkarikilu.. 
nine thedi varunu.. njanum ee vazhiyeee ..
Aaro malarmani aaro.. 
Ival ente kanavile penno.. 
Aarum kanathe ni enne
Vennilavee.. En arikee.. 
Penne penne niyen muhabathaay ishalumaay thazhuki nee.. Chernilleee.. Ooo

      (Azhakilay viriyuma..) 

Nilavaniyival.. 
Kinaavarayile lenkum kasavin chelumaaayy.. 
Monjaal vidarum.. Ninte poomugam kanan ezham baharupol.. 
Penne cheruchiri vidarumoo.. 
Ente karalil cherniduu.. 
Ennil pirishavumekumoo.. 
Arikilaay.. Thennalaay.. 
Penne penne mahar ekidam ennumen nenjilay neeyallayoo.. Ooo

Azhakilaay viriyumaa niranilavin punjiri
Surumayaal varanora mizhikalil minnum muhabath.. 
Aarum kand mayangan.. 
Oolen qalb kavaranu.. 
Enthoo ullam pidayan.. 
Ishkaal enje nokan..   
Manamil nirayum manas thirayum madhuramam chiri vidharumivalinn (2)
      (Azhakilaay viriyuma..)

...................................................................................................
അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ നിറനിലാവിൻ പുഞ്ചിരി..
സുറുമായാൽ വരനൊരാ മിഴികളിൽ മിന്നും മുഹബത്..
ആരും കണ്ട് മയങ്ങണ്..
ഓളെൻ ഖൽബ് കവരണ്..
എന്തോ ഉള്ളം പിടയണ്..
ഇഷ്കാൽ എന്നെ നോക്കണ്..
മനമിൽ നിറയും മനസ് തിരയും മധുരമാം ചിരി വിധറുമിവളിന്ന്... [2]
        (അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ..)

ഇശൽ വനിയില് ..
ഇതൾ വിരിയണു..
ഇവൾ ചേലോത്ത കാര്മുഗിലോ..
വാതിൽക്കരികിലു നിന്നെ തേടി വരുന്നു.. ഞാനും ഈ വഴിയേ.. ആരോ മലർമണി ആരോ..
ഇവൾ എന്റെ കനവിലെ പെണ്ണോ..
ആരും കാണാതെ നീ എന്നെ..
വെണ്ണിലവേ.. എൻ അരികേ..
പെണ്ണെ പെണ്ണെ നീ എൻ മുഹബതായി ഇശലുമായി തഴുകി നീ.. ചേർന്നില്ലേ.. ഓ ഓ
     (അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ..)

നിലാവനിയിവൾ..
കിനാവറയിലെ ലെങ്കും കസവിൻ ചേലുമായ്..
മൊഞ്ജാൽ വിടരും.. നിന്റെ പൂമുഖം കാണാൻ ഏഴാം ബഹറ് പോൽ..
പെണ്ണെ ചെറുച്ചിരി വിടരുമോ..
എന്റെ കരളിൽ ചേർന്നിടു..
എന്നിൽ പിരിശവുമെക്കുമോ..
അരികിലായ്.. തെന്നലായ്..
പെണ്ണെ പെണ്ണെ മഹർ ഏകിടാം.. എന്നുമെൻ നെഞ്ചിലായ് നീയല്ലയോ.. ഓ ഓ

അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ നിറനിലാവിൻ പുഞ്ചിരി..
സുറുമായാൽ വരാനൊരാ മിഴികളിൽ മിന്നും മുഹബത്..
ആരും കണ്ട് മയങ്ങണ്..
ഓളെൻ ഖൽബ് കവരണ്..
എന്തോ ഉള്ളം പിടയണ്..
ഇഷ്കാൽ എന്നെ നോക്കണ്..
മനമിൽ നിറയും മനസ് തിരയും മധുരമാം ചിരി വിധറുമിവളിന്ന്... [2]
        (അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ..)

ithal viriyan..

Vaathilkarikilu.. 
nine thedi varunu.. njanum ee vazhiyeee ..

Penne cheruchiri vidarumoo.. 
Ente karalil cherniduu.. 
Ennil pirishavumekumoo.. 
Arikilaay.. Thennalaay..

      (Azhakilaay viriyuma..)

...................................................................................................
അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ നിറനിലാവിൻ പുഞ്ചിരി..
സുറുമായാൽ വരനൊരാ മിഴികളിൽ മിന്നും മുഹബത്..
ആരും കണ്ട് മയങ്ങണ്..
ഓളെൻ ഖൽബ് കവരണ്..
എന്തോ ഉള്ളം പിടയണ്..
ഇഷ്കാൽ എന്നെ നോക്കണ്..
മനമിൽ നിറയും മനസ് തിരയും മധുരമാം ചിരി വിധറുമിവളിന്ന്... [2]

ഇശൽ വനിയില് ..
ഇതൾ വിരിയണു..
ഇവൾ ചേലോത്ത കാര്മുഗിലോ..
വാതിൽക്കരികിലു നിന്നെ തേടി വരുന്നു.. ഞാനും ഈ വഴിയേ.. ആരോ മലർമണി ആരോ..
ഇവൾ എന്റെ കനവിലെ പെണ്ണോ..
ആരും കാണാതെ നീ എന്നെ..
വെണ്ണിലവേ.. എൻ അരികേ..
പെണ്ണെ പെണ്ണെ നീ എൻ മുഹബതായി ഇശലുമായി തഴുകി നീ.. ചേർന്നില്ലേ.. ഓ ഓ
     (അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ..)

നിലാവനിയിവൾ..
കിനാവറയിലെ ലെങ്കും കസവിൻ ചേലുമായ്..
മൊഞ്ജാൽ വിടരും.. നിന്റെ പൂമുഖം കാണാൻ ഏഴാം ബഹറ് പോൽ..
പെണ്ണെ ചെറുച്ചിരി വിടരുമോ..
എന്റെ കരളിൽ ചേർന്നിടു..
എന്നിൽ പിരിശവുമെക്കുമോ..
അരികിലായ്.. തെന്നലായ്..
പെണ്ണെ പെണ്ണെ മഹർ ഏകിടാം.. എന്നുമെൻ നെഞ്ചിലായ് നീയല്ലയോ.. ഓ ഓ

അഴകിലായ് വിരിയുമാ നിറനിലാവിൻ പുഞ്ചിരി..

snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: What Bengaluru Woman, Zomato Agent Told NDTV: "He Pushed The Door" vs "She Threw Shoes"
snippet.description:
Two days after a Bengaluru woman alleged she was attacked by a Zomato delivery agent and shared videos showing her bleeding nose, there are two versions of a story that now involves an investigation and that has divided social media. The accused man, Kamaraj, says he was beaten with shoes and abuses were hurled at him, which the customer, Hitesha Chandranee, has emphatically denied. Zomato says it is supporting both, pending investigations, and wants "both sides of the story to come to light".

--------------

snippet.description:
Watch the Latest Promo of popular Tamil Serial #PooveUnakkaga that airs on Sun TV.

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021

Poove Unakkaga is a drama serial on Sun TV. Poovarasi and Keerthy share a heart-warming bond of friendship and hope to stay friends forever. Now Poovarasi makes a promise to her mother, that she won’t fall-in-love with anyone, but often dreams about a mysterious man. By a stroke of fate, he happens to be Kathir, a rich handsome young man who falls in love with Keerthy at first sight. Watch this refreshing tale of love and friendship to know more.

snippet.title: Ritviz - Pran [Official Lyric Video]
snippet.description:
5th track from my album DEV!

Track composed, produced & performed by Ritviz
Written by Ritviz & Anvita Bharti 

LYRICS -
Mai Khaama kha 
Chala chala aur badhta gaya 
Tumhari raah mein saath saans leta gaya 

Toh keh do na
Hume aach toh dedo na 
Ek baat toh chedo na
Jazbaat mein kho le na

O meri heer
Ho na khafa 
O meri heer
Chal na rula 
Na kar aafra 
Labrez kar na
Aa bhi ja

Dil mera
kuwara dil mera x4
O Dil mera
kuwara dil mera x4

Jo gaaye…..

Feeki feeki zindagani
Bhar de tu fagun ke rang sare
rang sare
Pran mere

Andhiyari kaari ratein 
Kar de tu poonam ki 
Ujiyare ujiyare 
Jaan mere

Jaan mere pran mere 
Agaaz kar unwan de 
Anjam de kuch naam de 
Iss geet ko pehchaan le

Mai Khaama kha 
Chala chala aur badhta gaya 
Tumhari raah mein saath saans leta gaya 
Tumhari raah mein saath saans leta gaya 

O meri heer
Ho na khafa 
O meri heer
Chal na rula 
Na kar aafra 
Labrez kar na
Aa bhi ja

Dil mera
kuwara dil mera x4
O Dil mera
kuwara dil mera x4
Jo gaaye…..

Jaise koyal gunn gunnate hue tum taare timm timmate

Waise angna mein tum aaye 
saari kaynaat muskuraaye  

Kaynaat muskuraaye 
Saari kaynaat muskuraaye 
Kaynaat muskuraaye 
Kaynaat 

Mai Khaama kha 
Chala chala aur badhta gaya 
Tumhari raah mein saath saans leta gaya 
Tumhari raah mein saath saans leta gaya

Episode 3122: Iyer Make Rasgulla For Jethalal
---------------------------------------------------------
Everyone in the Gokuldham is happy for Jethalal. Jethalal thanks everybody for helping him out in the Bhogilal case. Jethalal asked sunder about Daya and when she is coming back Sunder says she is not back soon. Iyer and Babita bring Rasgulla for Jethalal and that Rasgulla is made by Iyer. watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Watch the Latest promo of the Tamil Serial #Chithi 2 that airs on Sun TV.

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021
 
Watch Chithi 2 Mon-Sat @10.00 PM on Sun TV. 

Chithi 2, is a whole new story., about yet another ‘Chithi’, our kind-hearted and brave-spirited Saradha. Her portrayal of love, forgiveness, sacrifice, fierceness, and perseverance towards her family, through the thick and thin of life, makes one believe in the power of family. Watch and travel along with Saradha’s offbeat family. 

#Chithi2 #TamilSerial #SunTV #Chithi2Serial #Chithi2Promo #Promo

snippet.title: मऊ लुसलुशीत चपाती बनवण्याच्या सर्व उपयुक्त टिप्स | Mau Poli | How to make soft roti | MadhurasRecipe
snippet.description:
#MauPoli #RotiRecipe #MadhurasRecipe

मऊ पोळी बनवण्यासाठी लागणारे साहित्य

• १ १/४ कप पाणी 
• १/२ चमचा तेल

Madhura's recipe Masala (Pack of 3)  - https://amzn.to/2L6y13i
Madhurasrecipe Kanda Lasoon Masala - https://amzn.to/3okkjrP
Madhurasrecipe Byadgi Mirchi Masala - https://amzn.to/3hKvRSU
Madhurasrecipe Goda Masala - https://amzn.to/3hRjsg6
Flipkart - https://bityl.co/4Ip9
किंवा ९१३६८२२२२४ या नंबर वर व्हॉटसऍप मेसेज करा  

मधुराज रेसिपी मसाले ऑर्डर कसे करायचे यासाठी हा विडिओ पहा
https://youtu.be/9Db_owqWJe4

We already have seen how to make poli or chapatti. But today in this recipe you will learn to knead dough without dirtying your hands, how to make quick chapattis and how these chapattis can remain soft longer. These chapattis get nice layers and remain soft for longer time. You can try this recipe home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 3 cups Wheat flour
• 3/4 tsp Salt
• 1 1/4 cup Water
• 1/2 tsp Oil
• Oil for spreading on chapatti 

Method:
• In a bowl take wheat flour, salt and mix it well with spatula. 
• Add a little water at a time and continue mixing the flour with spatula. 
• Continue mixing until it comes together really good. 
• Clean the spatula and knead the dough. Continue kneading the dough for about a minute or 
  so. 
• Dust dry flour and clean the pot. Spread oil on the dough and knead it a little again to make it 
  smooth and even. 
• Again spread a little oil on the dough, cover and rest it for about 15-20 minutes. 
• If you are making the chapattis after some time then spread water instead of oil and rest the 
  dough. 
• Take the dough and knead it once more to make smooth and even. 
• Make small balls of dough. 
• Take one dough ball and make it smooth and even. 
• Dip it in dry flour and knead it into a small disc. 
• Spread a little oil and fold into half. 
• Again spread a little oil and fold it into quarter. 
• This will give you 3 layered chapattis. 
• For making 2 layered chapattis dip a dough ball into dry flour and roll a small oval disc. 
• Spread a little oil and pinch it at the center. 
• Fold it and roll it into chapatti to make 2 layered chapatti. 
• To save time keep the folded chapattis ready before rolling. 
• When you begin to fold the dough balls then you can turn on the gas to heat up the skillet. This 
  will help you to make chapattis quickly. 
• Take a folded disc and dip it in dry flour. 
• Roll round chapatti carefully. 
• The edges should be thin and center should be equally thin. 
• Transfer the chapatti on the skillet and roast from one side until small bubbles begin to appear 
  on upper side.  
• When upper surface dries a little, changes the color flip the chapatti over and spread a little oil 
  on it. 
• Flip over and spread a little oil on other side too. 
• Roast chapatti well from both sides and take it off on a jali. 
• Soft chapatti is all ready. 
• You can make around 9-10 chapattis from 3 cups flour.

For more Such Recipes

https://youtu.be/9Db_owqWJe4

We already have seen how to make poli or chapatti. But today in this recipe you will learn to knead dough without dirtying your hands, how to make quick chapattis and how these chapattis can remain soft longer. These chapattis get nice layers and remain soft for longer time. You can try this recipe home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 3 cups Wheat flour
• 3/4 tsp Salt
• 1 1/4 cup Water
• 1/2 tsp Oil
• Oil for spreading on chapatti 

Method:
• In a bowl take wheat flour, salt and mix it well with spatula. 
• Add a little water at a time and continue mixing the flour with spatula. 
• Continue mixing until it comes together really good. 
• Clean the spatula and knead the dough. Continue kneading the dough for about a minute or 
  so. 
• Dust dry flour and clean the pot. Spread oil on the dough and knead it a little again to make it 
  smooth and even. 
• Again spread a little oil on the dough, cover and rest it for about 15-20 minutes. 
• If you are making the chapattis after some time then spread water instead of oil and rest the 
  dough. 
• Take the dough and knead it once more to make smooth and even. 
• Make small balls of dough. 
• Take one dough ball and make it smooth and even. 
• Dip it in dry flour and knead it into a small disc. 
• Spread a little oil and fold into half. 
• Again spread a little oil and fold it into quarter. 
• This will give you 3 layered chapattis. 
• For making 2 layered chapattis dip a dough ball into dry flour and roll a small oval disc. 
• Spread a little oil and pinch it at the center. 
• Fold it and roll it into chapatti to make 2 layered chapatti. 
• To save time keep the folded chapattis ready before rolling. 
• When you begin to fold the dough balls then you can turn on the gas to heat up the skillet. This 
  will help you to make chapattis quickly. 
• Take a folded disc and dip it in dry flour. 
• Roll round chapatti carefully. 
• The edges should be thin and center should be equally thin. 
• Transfer the chapatti on the skillet and roast from one side until small bubbles begin to appear 
  on upper side.  
• When upper surface dries a little, changes the color flip the chapatti over and spread a little oil 
  on it. 
• Flip over and spread a little oil on other side too. 
• Roast chapatti well from both sides and take it off on a jali. 
• Soft chapatti is all ready. 
• You can make around 9-10 chapattis from 3 cups flour.

For more Such Recipes

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1195 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
An infuriated Angel stabs Heer for exposing her evil motive in front of everyone. Watch this thrilling sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: സാമൂഹ്യക്ഷേമ പെൻഷനുകൾ മാർച്ചിൽ ലഭിക്കില്ല!വിതരണം ഈ രീതിയിൽ|Pension news Kerala.Kerala Pension 2021
snippet.description:
Social security pension schemes are usually defined-benefit schemes, which provide ongoing regular pension payments. ... Private pension schemes are defined-contribution schemes that do not qualify as social insurance because they are not mandated by government and are not employment-related.

⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

⚠️ ഈ ചാനലിലൂടെ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന വീഡിയോകളിൽ ഒരുതരത്തിലുമുള്ള രാഷ്ട്രീയം/ മതം എന്നിവയുടെ അതിപ്രസരം ഇല്ല. ഗവൺമെന്റ് പോളിസികൾക്ക് എപ്പോൾ വേണമെങ്കിലും മാറ്റം ഉണ്ടാവാം. അതിനാൽ പുതിയ വീഡിയോ അപ്‌ഡേഷൻ കാണാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1194 & 1195 | Recap
snippet.description:
When Virat threatens to kill Angel, she tells her group not to kill Heer. Later, Heer's family goes to the hospital for her surgery, but Angel protests and stops Heer from getting the surgery done. What will happen next?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Chambdi Baba Bhagaye Bhoot | RajKummar Rao | Janhvi Kapoor | Varun Sharma | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Lo bhai aa gaya humara ek aur bollywood collab after ages
Roohi is releasing on 11th March
ONLY AND ONLY IN CINEMAS
JAANA AUR ZAROOR DEKHNA
Bhai maza aa gaya ye waale video mein kyunki apne iss video mein hai Rajkummar bhaiya, Varun bhai aur Janhvi Kapoor
Toh hum log jab goa mein apni mara rahe the tab apne @JioStudios  aur @Maddock Films  waalo ne apne ko bola ki bhai ek acha saa video bana na hai roohi ke star cast ke saath, waise toh bollywood collabs karna kaafi kamm kar diye hai (time nai re abhi ACV team ke paas, kaun mumbai jaye Ulhasnagar se😂😂) lekin ye waali star cast mein apne Raj bhai hai, jo actor ke roop mein kuch zyada hi ache insaan hai❤️ aur Varun Sharma ke saath toh apna pehle rishta tha
Toh hum mana nai kar paye
Plus Janhvi pe apun ko crush tha 😂😂
Upar se film ke producer Dinesh Vijan bhi kaafi respectful aur pyaare the, toh jab bhi bollywood se ache humble log milte (jo rare hota hai😂😂) humara dil kehta ki inke saath toh kaam karna hi chahiye
Islie bas humne kuch darawani movies dekhi apne bhootiyapa ko badaya aur ye script likhi jo hai chambdi baba ka part 2
Ye waala video end tak zaroor dekhna kyunki isme bahut masti hai aur kaafi zyada improvisation hai (all thanks to legend RAJKUMMAR RAO)
Production :
@Jashan Sirwani  , @Tanish Sirwani  , @Ritesh Sadhwani  toh hamesha hi hote hai
Is baar @Rohit Sadhwani  aur Grishim bhi chale kyunki bollywood ka collab tha, waise harami ke bache 2 din call nai uthate 
Main ek whatsapp kiya ki Rajkummar Rao se milne jaa rahe
Ghar ke neeche pahuch gaye saale
Iski script maine aur @Jashan Sirwani  ne saath mein likhi hai kyunki @Kunal Chhabhria  mc ko Ambernath se Ulhasnagar aane mein bhi bahut time lagta hai
Traffic ne dhanda kharab kar diya hai
Shoot humara Cinderella @Siddharth Kedare aur @Kunal Chhabhria ne kiya kyunki camera inke paas girvi rehta hai... bhadepe chalate hai aur kamate hai, mujhse paise nahi lete hai iss liye inko jhelna padta hai.
Baaki humara super super thanks to
Jio Studios jinhone hume phone karke ijjat di😂
Maddock films jinhone saamne se humari ijjat cheeni nahi😂
Rajkummar Rao jinse bahut saari cheeze seekhni ko mili, jaise ki jitna zyada talented banda utna kam ghamand🔥
Varun Sharma jinki comic timing aur expression meri acting distract kar rahi thi
Aur Janhvi Kapoor jinki maine raj bhai aur Varun bhai ne bahuuut taang kheechi 😂😂
All in all maza aa gaya please ye movie cinemas ke jaake zaroor dekhna
ROOHI IS RELEASING ON 11TH MARCH❤️

#Roohi #11thMarch #AshishChanchlani #RajKummarRao #JanhviKapoor #VarunSharma #MaddockFilms #JioStudios

snippet.title: അപകടകാരിയായ അണലിയുടെ കടിയേറ്റ കുഞ്ഞിന് സംഭവിച്ചത്? | Snakemaster EP 647
snippet.description:
അപകടകാരിയായ അണലിയുടെ കടിയേറ്റ കുഞ്ഞിന് സംഭവിച്ചത് ? കുട്ടികൾ ഉള്ള വീട്ടുകാർ തീർച്ചയായും ഇത്‌ കണ്ടിരിക്കണം...

തിരുവനന്തപുരം ജില്ലയിലെ ചിറയിൻകീഴിനടുത്തുള്ള പെരുങ്കുഴി എന്ന സ്ഥലത്തുള്ള ഒരു വീട്ടിലേക്കാണ് വാവയുടെ ഇന്നത്തെ യാത്ര,എട്ട് വയസുള്ള മിടുക്കനായ കുട്ടി വീടിനോട് ചേർന്ന പറമ്പിൽ കളിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു,അമ്പും വില്ലും,ചൂണ്ട എന്നിവ വച്ചാണ് കൂടുതലായി കളിക്കുന്നത്,ഇന്ന് അമ്പും വില്ലും ഉപയോഗിച്ച് മരത്തിൽ നിന്ന് കായ്കൾ പറിച്ചുകൊണ്ടിരുന്നപ്പോൾ ഒന്ന് താഴെയുള്ള പറമ്പിൽ വീണു,എടുക്കാൻ ചെന്നപ്പോൾ എന്തോ കടിച്ചു,ആരോടും പറയാതെ തുളസി ഇല ഉപയോഗിച്ചു സ്വയം ചികിൽസിച്ചു,പക്ഷെ പെട്ടന്ന് ക്ഷീണിതനാവുകയും,അബോധാവസ്ഥയിൽ എത്തുകയും ചെയ്തു,പിന്നീടാണ് വീട്ടുകാർ അറിയുന്നത് അപകടകാരിയായ അണലിയാണുകടിച്ചതെന്ന്,അപടം നിറഞ്ഞ ദിവസങ്ങൾകൊടുവിൽ അവൻ ഇന്ന് വീട്ടിൽ ചികിത്സയിലാണ്,ഇവിടെ സംഭവിച്ച കാര്യങ്ങൾ മാതാപിതാക്കൾ എല്ലാവരും അറിഞ്ഞിരിക്കണം,ഇനി ആർക്കും ഇങ്ങനെ ഒരു അനുഭവം ഉണ്ടാകരുത്,കാണുക സ്നേക്ക് മാസ്റ്ററിന്റെ ഈ എപ്പിസോഡ്...

Vava’s journey on that day was to a house at Perunmkuzhi near Chirayinkeezhu in Thiruvananthapuram district. 
There a smart 8-year-old boy was playing in the courtyard near his house. 
He was playing with crude bow, arrow, and fishing rod. When he was trying to bring down some fruits from a tree using his bow and arrow, one of the fruits fell to a nearby plot of land. When he went to take it, something bit him. He didn’t rise any alarm or tell this to anyone. Instead, he did some self-treatment using Tulsi (Holy Basil) leaves. But he became tired soon and swooned.

It was only after that the family members came to realise that he had been bitten by a viper.

After going through perilous days he is now under treatment at home.
All parents should know what had happened there. Nobody else should have this bad experience again. 
WATCH THIS EPISODE OF SNAKE MASTER!!!


A show that gets on the wild trail with Vava Suresh, Kerala’s renowned wildlife conservationist, environmentalist and nature enthusiast. Experience close encounters with the most awesome, snakes. See this master charmer have his way with the King Cobras and Kraits, Vipers and Pythons. 
A man on a mission, Vava Suresh rescues snakes that have strayed from their habitats, stranded and facing threats. He releases them back in the wild. 
Watch him as he flirts with them, charms them, and works his magic on them.  Packed with adventure and adrenalin-kicking exploits, Snakemaster explores Kerala’s wilderness and dense forest paths to take you to the fascinating world of these deadly creatures.  
On the show, Vava Suresh rescues snakes which are stranded and are facing threats and dangers of all kinds.  

Subscribe for More videos : 
https://goo.gl/TJ4nCn 

Find us on :- 
YouTube : https://goo.gl/7Piw2y 
Facebook : http://goo.gl/5drgCV 
Website : http://kaumudy.tv 
Instagram : 
https://www.instagram.com/kaumudytv
https://www.instagram.com/keralakaumudi

#Snakemaster #VavaSuresh #Kaumudy

WATCH THIS EPISODE OF SNAKE MASTER!!!


A show that gets on the wild trail with Vava Suresh, Kerala’s renowned wildlife conservationist, environmentalist and nature enthusiast. Experience close encounters with the most awesome, snakes. See this master charmer have his way with the King Cobras and Kraits, Vipers and Pythons. 
A man on a mission, Vava Suresh rescues snakes that have strayed from their habitats, stranded and facing threats. He releases them back in the wild. 
Watch him as he flirts with them, charms them, and works his magic on them.  Packed with adventure and adrenalin-kicking exploits, Snakemaster explores Kerala’s wilderness and dense forest paths to take you to the fascinating world of these deadly creatures.  
On the show, Vava Suresh rescues snakes which are stranded and are facing threats and dangers of all kinds.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 862 | 15th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 862: Soda Shop
-------------------------------------
Men of Gokuldham are sitting at the soda shop and enjoying their conversation. To make fun of Popatlal, Bhide started the budget discussion. After all the fun and games, the men talk about how important Abdul's Soda Shop is for them.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Agnishikha" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Agnishika: Sikha is an innocent naïve tribal girl, who is the Star of her village Baghshundi. Sikha has respect for her traditions. Vikram visits Shikha’s village and unknowingly participates in some rituals with her, which according to her tribe is a marriage ceremony. So when Shikha’s community goes back to Bikram to ask him to accept her as his wife, Bikram denies the same because he was totally unaware of the whole scenario

Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Agnishikha" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Agnishika: Sikha is an innocent naïve tribal girl, who is the Star of her village Baghshundi. Sikha has respect for her traditions. Vikram visits Shikha’s village and unknowingly participates in some rituals with her, which according to her tribe is a marriage ceremony. So when Shikha’s community goes back to Bikram to ask him to accept her as his wife, Bikram denies the same because he was totally unaware of the whole scenario

snippet.title: Bank Strike : Government Banks को Privatise क्यों कर रही है Modi Government? (BBC Hindi)
snippet.description:
देश के सबसे बड़े बैंक कर्मचारी संगठन यूनाइटेड फोरम ऑफ बैंक यूनियंस ने हड़ताल का आह्वान किया है. फोरम में भारत के बैंक कर्मचारियों और अफसरों के नौ संगठन शामिल हैं. हड़ताल की सबसे बड़ी वजह सरकार का एलान है कि वो आईडीबीआई बैंक के अलावा दो और सरकारी बैंकों का निजीकरण करने जा रही है. बैंक यूनियनें निजीकरण का विरोध कर रही हैं. उनका कहना है कि जब सरकारी बैंकों को मज़बूत करके अर्थव्यवस्था में तेज़ी लाने की ज़िम्मेदारी सौंपने की ज़रूरत है उस वक़्त सरकार एकदम उलटे रास्ते पर चल रही है.

लेखः आलोक जोशी
आवाज़ः नवीन नेगी
वीडियो एडिटः मनीष जालुई

#Bank #BankStrike #NirmalaSitharaman 

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

फ़ेसबुक- https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsHindi
ट्विटर- https://twitter.com/BBCHindi
इंस्टाग्राम- https://www.instagram.com/bbchindi/

बीबीसी हिंदी का एंड्रॉयड ऐप डाउनलोड करने के लिए क्लिक करें- https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=uk.co.bbc.hindi

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Qayamat - Episode 21 Teaser - 16th March 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Qayamat - Episode 21 Teaser - 16th March 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Qayamat is a story of a young and beautiful girl whose life decisions are dominated by those around her. Eventually, all hell breaks loose when the people closest to her repeatedly make the same mistake making her future bleak. Ifrah along with her parents and elder sister Samra belongs to the lower middle class and believes in hard work and honesty. Ifrah and Samra’s parents are put in a tough spot when Ifrah’s uncle Mukhtar asks for Samra’s hand in marriage for his son Rashid. The families agree to the proposal without taking Samra’s approval however soon after marriage Samra suffers mistreatment from Rashid until she meets a tragic incident leaving Ifrah to face the dire consequences.
Unable to learn from their past mistake, Ifrah’s parents agree to the wishes of Mukhtar and Rashid leaving Ifrah alone. Despite being aware of Rashid’s vicious and ill-behavior, will Ifrah follow the path of her elder sister Samra? Or will she forsake her true self in the need for revenge? Despite all the hardships and the pain of losing a loved one, how will Ifrah respond to the situation around her?
Written by: Sarwat Nazeer
Directed by: Ali Faizan
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :
Ahsan Khan
Neelum Munir
Amar Khan
Haroon Shahid
Saba Faisal
Shabbir Jan
Noor-Ul-Hasan
Kinza Malik
Sana Fakhar
Mizna Waqas
Haris Waheed


#QayamatEP21Teaser
#HARPALGEO
#Entertainment

snippet.title: Good NEWS | CA Students and Chartered Accountants | CA Qualification is Now Equivalent To PG Degree
snippet.description:
#NeerajArora #BreakingNews #ICAI 

Prepare for your upcoming CA Intermediate/IPCC Exams in May 2021 and November 2021 With Confidence!

Save More Than 60% On Complete Packages

👉 Visit: https://www.edu91.org​

👉 Subjects Offered: Auditing and Assurance, Strategic Management, Accounting, Advanced Accounting, Income Tax, GST, Corporate Laws, Other Laws, Financial Management, Cost Accounting, Enterprise Information System

Faculty: Neeraj Arora, CA Nitin Guru, CA PS Beniwal, CA Shivangi Agarwal

Modes of Classes Available: Google Drive, Android App

🔥🔥 Top Features of Our Classes: 🔥🔥 

✅ Maximum Coverage of Institute’s Study Material for SM, GST, Tax, Audit, Law, and Accounting
✅ Latest Updated Lectures Using the Latest & Most Engaging Teaching Delivery
✅ Special Question Bank & RTPs To Give You A Special Challenge
✅ Unique Revision Sessions for Every Chapter Before Your Exams Commence
✅ Chapter-wise Tests with Detailed Solutions (as per ICAI guidelines)
✅ 20+ Multiple Choice Questions Per Chapter to Strengthen Your Concepts with Each Class
✅ 2+ CASE STUDIES Per Chapter to Practically Apply What You Learnt 
✅ 100% & UNLIMITED Doubt Support till The Very Last Day Before Your Exams Commence - Edu91 is Known for Its Highly Responsive Doubt Support Across India 
Resource Material with Tons of Practical Examples at Every Step of The Way
✅ Special Gifts worth INR 51,000 To Be Won for Exceptional Students
✅ Special INDEX FUND Investing Course

Wait! The benefits don’t end here, with every purchase you also get:
✅ Access From Any Android Device
✅ Comprehensive Hand-Written Notes
✅ Highly Detailed Charts & Memory Techniques
✅ 24x7 Tech Support (should you face any issues)

===========================================================

Hi guys!

In this video, I will be sharing an amazing announcement with all of you. 

University Grants Commission (An Autonomous Body by Government of India) that is responsible for conferring the university status to all the colleges and universities of India has resolved that Chartered Accountancy, Company Secretaries, and Cost Management Accountancy Degrees to have the same stature as that of Post Graduation Degrees in India. 

This comes as great news for all Qualified CA Professionals. If you earlier had to go into the teaching industry and wanted to become a professor, then any top university of India had a mandate that you at-least have 1 post graduate degree.

But, not anymore! Any CA Professional can easily appear for any NEET exam or pursue doctorate in their field of interest as their degrees now have the same value and status as that of Masters or Post Graduate.

You can read about more of this news on leading news websites.

I am sharing one article that I found on NDTV: https://www.ndtv.com/education/icai-ca-qualification-will-be-equivalent-postgraduate-degree-ugc

https://www.edu91.org/s/pages/nov-2021-classes

snippet.title: Highlights - Mumbai City FC 2-1 ATK Mohun Bagan - Final | Hero ISL 2020-21
snippet.description:
Mumbai City FC beat ATK Mohun Bagan 2-1 in the 2020-21 #HeroISLFinal to win their first-ever #HeroISL trophy! 

David Williams broke the deadlock in the 18th minute but an unfortunate own goal from Tiri brought the Islanders level just before the half-hour mark. The match appeared to be headed for extra-time but Bartholomew Ogbeche made the most of an error from the Mariners' backline and set up Bipin Singh for the match-winning goal!

That result saw Mumbai City FC become the fourth different champion in the tournament's history and also the first team to do the double! 

Tell us your favourite moment from what was an exciting contest at the Fatorda Stadium!

#MCFCATKMB #LetsFootball

Follow all the match highlights & updates on our official YouTube channel. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the bell icon.

To subscribe, click - https://bit.ly/35AzdBp

For all the latest news & updates on Hero ISL, visit - http://bit.ly/HeroISLWeb

snippet.title: Kanyadaan - Full Episode | 14 March 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.
